prompt:
[Reference Image]
Using the provided reference image, create an ultra-realistic full-body lifestyle portrait of a beautiful young woman standing casually inside a modern minimalist apartment. She has long, silky dark brown hair with soft waves, flawless porcelain skin, Korean-inspired natural makeup, subtle rosy blush, glossy pink lips, delicate facial features, and a warm, gentle smile.
She is wearing an oversized FC Barcelona-inspired home football jersey in deep navy and garnet vertical stripes with a relaxed fit, paired with ultra-baggy light-wash wide-leg denim jeans that drape over chunky white sneakers. A sleek black shoulder bag hangs from one shoulder, and both hands are tucked naturally into her front pockets for an effortless street-style pose.
The setting is a bright Scandinavian-inspired apartment with white walls, warm wooden flooring, minimalist black furniture, a framed black-and-white architectural poster leaning against a cabinet, soft natural daylight from large windows, and a clean, uncluttered interior with neutral tones.
The subject stands facing the camera with a slight head tilt and relaxed posture, creating a cozy Pinterest and Korean fashion influencer aesthetic. Capture realistic fabric textures, natural folds in the oversized jeans, detailed hair strands, photorealistic skin, balanced indoor lighting, and a high-end editorial feel.
Style: Korean fashion influencer, Pinterest aesthetic, minimalist home interior, casual streetwear, football jersey outfit, oversized denim trend, lifestyle photography, photorealistic, soft daylight, Instagram editorial, premium smartphone photography, ultra-detailed, masterpiece, best quality, 8K.
